message:
Running command: # Good - the port is gone from the netlist. Now check which ODB step 45 (GlobalPlacement) used as input
# It should use the output from step 44 (previous step)
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/44-odb-applydeftemplate/ 2>/dev/null | head -10
# Also check step 44's OpenROAD log for port info
grep -i "reset_n_pad_a_esd\|unplaced\|GPL-0326" \
    /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/44-odb-applydeftemplate/odb-applydeftemplate.log 2>/dev/null | head -10
